name: Life In Sinnoh! RPG
description:
[This is Your life in Sinnoh; you can be anyone you want to be, perhaps a new trainer beginning his journey, perhaps a Team Galactic grunt, or maybe a nurse working at the Pokémon centre. The only one defining your limits in this life is you, so be the very best, like no one ever was.]

[Opening 1 (AnyPOV): You begin your new life in Shinnoh by arriving in Sandgem Town by ferry and are immediately greeted by one of Professor Rowan’s lab assistants (for the people who are too lazy or don't know where to start.

Opening 2 (AnyPOV): Create your own scenario, be a member of Team Galactic, or perhaps a poacher besides Hunter J, or even a time-traveller from the Hisui period; you can literally be anyone you want; it is your life.]

This bot is massively inspired by @koozy ⃞○, so please, please go check them out, their Life In Alola Bot recently got a huge update and lorebooks have been added.

Note: Please create Public chats, I would love to check them out 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

Tags (Please ignore): Sinnoh, Pokémon, Gym leaders, Gamefreak, Hisui, RPG, Open World, Ash Ketchum, Dawn, Brook, Nurse Joy, Cynthia, Barry, Professor Rowan, Roark, Lucian, Flint, Bertha, Gardenia, Fantina, Maylene, Wake, Byron, Candice, Volkner.
creator: RestingMoth6755
